stories.title: **Headline:** Jose Ramirez Becomes First Guardian to Homer Against All 29 Teams — Two Milestones in Six Days

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
José Ramírez is now the ONLY Guardian to hit a home run against all 29 MLB teams.

Saturday at Truist Park, he took an 82 mph pitch 403 feet off the Braves — completing a career feat no Cleveland player had ever pulled off.

Rare. #ForTheLand #MLB

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
José Ramírez — two milestones in six days:

→ April 6: Set Guardians all-time games played record (1,620 games)
→ April 11: First Guardian to HR against all 29 teams

Career: ~286 HR, 288 SB. All as a Guardian.

The Hall of Fame case writes itself. #MLB #Guardians

article.headline: Jose Ramirez Becomes First Guardian to Homer Against All 29 Teams — Two Franchise Records in Six Days

stories.title: **Headline:** Konnor Griffin Signs 9-Year, $140 Million Extension — Largest Ever for a Rookie-Season Player

x_posts.label: Post 2
x_posts.text:
Konnor Griffin is 19 years old and just signed a 9-year, $140 million extension with Pittsburgh.

Largest guarantee in Pirates history. Largest for any player in their rookie season — ever.

He's played fewer than 10 MLB games. #LetsGoBucs #MLB

stories.title: **Headline:** Aaron Judge at 371 Career HRs — Chasing 400 While Yankees Rotation Pitches Like 1940s

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Aaron Judge has 371 career home runs.

He needs 29 more to reach 400 this season — and he just hit 53 last year.

If Judge stays healthy, that milestone is a when, not an if. #Yankees #MLB

article.headline: Aaron Judge Is 29 Home Runs From 400 — And the Yankees' Rotation Is Historic Without Cole or Rodón

stories.title: **Headline:** Ohtani Batting Resurgence — 5 HRs in Last 9 Games, .996 OPS Through 73 Plate Appearances

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Shohei Ohtani through his first ~20 games as a two-way player in 2026:

5 home runs in his last 9 games. .996 OPS over 73 plate appearances.

The slow start? Ancient history. He's locked in. #Dodgers #MLB

stories.title: **Headline:** Red Sox Showing Signs of Life — Five-Run 9th Inning Rally on Saturday

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
The Red Sox scored five runs in the 9th inning Saturday to win.

They've been baseball's worst team this month. But at least this is a sign of life.

Alex Cora's squad still has time to turn this around. #RedSox #MLB
